title: Shipwright planning INDEX inFlight tuple
description: Committed metadata tuple for an active deliver run (PRD 032 R1/R13). Lifecycle status is derived by PRD 033 — never stored here.

unitId.description: Planning unit id this tuple binds to.

runId.description: Durable deliver run identifier (authoritative lease key).

branch.description: Implementing feature branch (cleartext; interim exposure for non-private units until PRD 034 redaction).

epoch.description: Optimistic concurrency generation; increments on each write.

branchToken.description: Opaque hashed branch suffix reserved for PRD 034 private-unit redaction (R13).
